segments.speaker: SAM
segments.line: We're going to stall, Owais. We need to level out.
segments.visual_cue: Medium shot of SAM, expression intense and focused.

segments.speaker: OWAIS
segments.line: Hold on to your seat, Sam. We're going to make this plane fly.
segments.visual_cue: Close-up of SAM, sweat beading on his forehead.

segments.speaker: L
segments.line: What's going on? Why are we shaking so much?
segments.visual_cue: Medium shot of OWAIS, jaw clenched in concentration.

segments.speaker: ARAESA
segments.line: Everyone, please fasten your seatbelts. We're experiencing some turbulence.
segments.visual_cue: Wide shot of Lео, looking pale and frightened.

segments.speaker: OWAIS
segments.line: We're coming out of the dive. Hold on to your seats.
segments.visual_cue: Close-up of ARAESA, a calm smile on her face as she checks the safety harnesses.

segments.speaker: L
segments.visual_cue: Close-up of OWAIS, eyes locked on the altimeter.

segments.speaker: ARAESA
segments.line: Everyone, please remain calm. This is just turbulence.
segments.visual_cue: Close-up of Lео, eyes wide with fear.

segments.speaker: OWAIS
segments.line: We're going to make it through this. Just hold on.
segments.visual_cue: Medium shot of ARAESA, her voice steady and reassuring.

segments.speaker: SAM
segments.line: Owais, I think we're crashing. We need to do something.
segments.visual_cue: Medium shot of SAM, expression intense and focused.

segments.speaker: ARAESA
segments.line: Everyone, please stay calm. We're experiencing a minor storm.
segments.visual_cue: Close-up of SAM, desperation in his voice.

segments.speaker: L
segments.line: This is insane! We're going to die!
segments.visual_cue: Close-up of ARAESA, her hands steady as she checks the instruments.

segments.speaker: OWAIS
segments.line: We're not going to crash. We're going to make it through this.
segments.visual_cue: Wide shot of Lео, his face contorted in terror.

segments.speaker: SAM
segments.visual_cue: Medium shot of SAM, expression intense and focused.

segments.speaker: OWAIS
segments.line: We made it through the storm. We're going to land safely.
segments.visual_cue: Close-up of SAM, his eyes wide with shock.

segments.speaker: ARAESA
segments.line: Everyone, please prepare for landing. We're starting our descent.
segments.visual_cue: Close-up of OWAIS, a hint of a smile on his face.

segments.speaker: L
segments.line: I... I think I'm going to be sick.
segments.visual_cue: Medium shot of ARAESA, her voice steady and reassuring.
